commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke --force --grace-period=0 --ignore-not-found=true 2>&1 | tail -2'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/gpu-smoke-cdi.yaml /tmp/gpu-smoke-cdi.yaml && kubectl --context ohio apply -f /tmp/gpu-smoke-cdi.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke-cdi -o wide'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke-cdi 2>&1 | tail -30'
